name: SMART: Simulated Students Aligned with Item Response Theory for Question Difficulty Prediction
venue: Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
summary: EMNLP 2025 paper introducing SMART, a simulated-student pipeline that generates open-ended responses aligned with IRT ability and item difficulty, scores them with an LLM-based scoring model, and fits an IRT model to predict item difficulty.

access_attempts.notes: Used abstract, methodology, results, qualitative evaluation, conclusion, and limitations sections for extraction.
